original: Pursuant to a review of your eligibility, this notice serves to inform you that your Food Assistance Program benefit allotment shall be reduced to $187.00 per month, effective October 2, 2026, said reduction being predicated upon your household income exceeds the applicable income limit. target: Your food assistance will go down to $187 a month starting October 2, 2026. This is because your income is above the limit. If you think this is wrong, you can ask for a hearing within 90 days.
